title: Savory Sweet Filipino Pork Sisig
description: A jammy and fluffy Filipino dish featuring mixed spice and score-fat pork, perfect for midnight cravings, and sugar-free friendly. It is typically served as an appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: pork face
ingredients.notes: cheeks or ears can be used

ingredients.name: chili peppers
ingredients.notes: siling labuyo or bird's eye chili

instructions: Grill the pork face over medium heat until it is crispy and charred.
Chop the grilled pork into small pieces and set aside.
Heat a wok over medium heat and add the diced onion.
Cook the onion until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the chopped chili peppers to the wok and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped pork, salt, black pepper, fish sauce, and vinegar to the wok.
Stir everything together and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Squeeze the calamansi juice over the top of the sisig and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the sisig immediately, garnished with additional calamansi and chili peppers if desired.
